# Gcore Hosting

- [Hosting](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting.md)

## Dedicated servers
- [About dedicated server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/about-dedicated-servers.md): Provision physical dedicated servers with Intel Xeon E3-1270 v5 processors, DDR4 ECC memory, IPMI management, and full resource allocation for data-intensive...

## Before purchase
- [Test the connectivity between your location and the server you want to buy](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/before-purchase/test-the-connectivity-between-your-location-and-the-server-you-want-to-buy.md): Use Looking Glass tool to test ping, traceroute, and BGP routes between your IP address and Gcore static nodes across locations.
- [Order a dedicated server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/order-a-dedicated-server.md): Purchase dedicated servers by selecting tariffs, configuring parameters (OS, domain, traffic, IPv4/IPv6 addresses), and completing payment through Control Pa...
- [Upgrade your dedicated server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/upgrade-your-dedicated-server.md): Request hardware upgrades for Dedicated Servers including RAID configuration, disk/RAM/network card changes via support tickets with 150 USD/EUR service fee.

## Manage
- [Log in to DCImanager](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/log-in-to-dcimanager.md): Access DCImanager panel with dedicated credentials to manage servers, reboot, or stop instances via the Servers menu.
- [Log in to IPMI](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/log-in-to-ipmi.md): Access IPMI interface for Dedicated Servers to remotely power on/off, reboot, or reinstall OS via DCI manager or server panel.

## Connect
- [Connect to a Windows server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/connect/connect-to-a-windows-server.md): Connect to Windows servers using Remote Desktop Connection with server IP address, username, and password from the control panel or purchase email.
- [Connect to a Linux server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/connect/connect-to-a-linux-server.md): Connect to Linux servers via SSH using server IP, username, and password, or access DCI Manager and VM Manager control panels with separate credentials.
- [Manage SSH keys](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/manage-ssh-keys.md): Create, edit, and delete SSH public keys for automated server authentication across dedicated server instances.
- [Change the port for SSH connections](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/change-the-port-for-ssh-connections.md): Modify SSH port in sshd_config, restart SSH service, update firewall rules, and verify connectivity on Linux servers.

## Operating system
- [Install a Linux OS from your ISO image](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/operating-system/install-a-linux-os-from-your-iso-image.md): Upload and mount custom Linux ISO images to dedicated servers via DCI manager and IPMI Virtual Storage for OS installation.
- [Install a Linux OS from a template](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/operating-system/install-a-linux-os-from-a-template.md): Deploy Linux OS templates (CentOS, Debian, Ubuntu, FreeBSD) or Windows Server to dedicated servers via DCI manager Operations panel.

## Networking

## Additional IP addresses
- [Buy an additional IP address](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/networking/additional-ip-addresses/buy-an-additional-ip-address.md): Purchase additional IPv4 and IPv6 addresses for Dedicated Servers and Virtual Private Servers via Control Panel IP addresses management.
- [Configure an additional IP address](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/networking/additional-ip-addresses/configure-an-additional-ip-address.md): Configure additional IPv4 and IPv6 addresses on Debian/Ubuntu, CentOS, and Windows Server 2012 by editing network configuration files or Server Manager setti...
- [Connect dedicated servers into a VLAN](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/networking/connect-dedicated-servers-into-a-vlan.md): Create and configure VLANs in DCI Manager to connect dedicated servers across physical locations with internal networking.
- [Configure a 10 Gbps network card](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/networking/configure-a-10-gbps-network-card.md): Enable 10 Gbps network interface on Dedicated Servers using ethtool, ip commands, and network configuration files for Ubuntu/Debian with LACP support.
- [Set up a PTR record](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/set-up-a-ptr-record.md): Configure PTR records for VPS and Dedicated Server IP addresses to enable reverse DNS mapping for email server authentication.
- [Reboot a server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/reboot-a-server.md): Reboot a dedicated server instance via the Servers menu in the control panel.
- [Check statistics of your dedicated server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/check-statistics-of-your-dedicated-server.md): View incoming and outgoing traffic statistics and total traffic volume for dedicated servers in DCI Manager Statistics section.
- [Delete a dedicated server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/delete-a-dedicated-server.md): Remove dedicated server instances via Control Panel; permanently erases data and stops billing after deletion confirmation.

## Troubleshooting
- [Renew your server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-a-server-that-was-suspended-for-non-payment.md): Recharge account balance or enable auto-payment to reactivate suspended virtual servers and resolve non-payment status.
- [Troubleshoot a server that is not responding to ping requests](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-a-server-that-is-not-responding-to-ping-requests.md): Diagnose ping connectivity failures by checking Great Firewall blocks, verifying network configuration (IP address, netmask, gateway), and confirming additio...
- [Remove your IP address from blacklists](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/remove-your-ip-address-from-blacklists.md): Check IP blacklist status using third-party services and contact blacklist operators for delisting; configure DNS records and email authentication to prevent...
- [Troubleshoot errors with ISO image installation](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-errors-with-iso-image-installation.md): Diagnose ISO image upload failures, file naming restrictions, size limits, and DCI manager errors in dedicated server installations.
- [Troubleshoot IPMI errors](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-ipmi-errors.md): Diagnose and resolve IPMI login failures, session errors (code 1006), unavailable IPMI URLs, and remote console connection issues in DCImanager.
- [Troubleshoot issues with an incorrect IP location](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-issues-with-an-incorrect-ip-location.md): Verify IP geolocation accuracy using MaxMind and RIPE databases; contact support to request location updates if discrepancies persist.
- [Troubleshoot issues with SSH connection](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-issues-with-ssh-connection.md): Verify SSH port 22 connectivity using telnet or Putty, validate server credentials from Control Panel Instructions, and check OS settings via VNC/IPMI if con...
- [Troubleshoot packet loss and high ping](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-packet-loss-or-high-ping.md): Diagnose packet loss and latency exceeding 110ms using ping, tracert/traceroute/mtr commands; disable VPN/proxy or reset network settings via OS reinstall.

## Virtual servers
- [About virtual servers](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/about-virtual-servers.md): Configure KVM-SSD virtual servers with SSH access, VNC console, and isolated OS kernels on Debian, CentOS, Ubuntu, FreeBSD, Windows Server, or Solaris.

## Before purchase
- [Choose a virtual server for your needs](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/before-purchase/choose-a-virtual-server-for-your-needs.md): Compare KVM-SSD, KVM-SAS, KVM-HIGHCPU-SSD, KVM-HIGHCPU-SAS Virtual Server plans by CPU cores, RAM, disk type, data center location, and OS compatibility.
- [Test the connectivity between your location and the server you want to buy](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/before-purchase/test-the-connectivity-between-your-location-and-the-server-you-want-to-buy.md): Use Looking Glass tool to test ping, traceroute, and BGP routes between your IP address and Gcore static nodes across locations.
- [Order a virtual server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/order-a-virtual-server.md): Purchase virtual server with OS selection, additional IP addresses, domain configuration, and automatic activation within 3 hours via cart checkout and payment.
- [Upgrade your virtual server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/upgrade-your-virtual-server.md): Replace Virtual Server plan by selecting new tariff with matching location and higher or equal specifications, then submit upgrade request via Support ticket...

## Manage
- [Features and functions of VMmanager 6](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/main-features-and-functions-of-vmmanager-6.md): Manage VPS instances via VMmanager 6 control panel: start/stop/restart servers, reinstall OS, mount ISO images, manage disks, access VNC console, run scripts...

## Connect
- [Connect to a Windows server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/connect/connect-to-a-windows-server.md): Connect to Windows servers using Remote Desktop Connection with server IP address, username, and password from the control panel or purchase email.

## Linux server
- [Connect to a Linux server via control panel](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/connect-to-a-linux-server-via-control-panel.md): Access Linux server console through VMmanager control panel using the monitor icon for remote server management.
- [Connect to a Linux server via SSH](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/connect-to-linux-server-via-ssh.md): Establish SSH remote connections to Linux servers (CentOS, Debian, Ubuntu, FreeBSD) using credentials from server instructions panel.
- [Manage SSH keys](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/manage-ssh-keys.md): Create, edit, and delete SSH public keys for automated server authentication across dedicated server instances.
- [Change the port for SSH connections](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/linux-server/change-the-port-for-ssh-connections.md): Modify SSH port in sshd_config, restart SSH service, update firewall rules, and verify connectivity on Linux servers.
- [Connect to a virtual server via VNC in VMmanager 6](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/connect/connect-to-a-virtual-server-via-vnc.md): Access VPS desktop via VNC console in VMmanager 6 using Remote Frame Buffer protocol with root credentials from Instructions tab.
- [Install GUI (desktop environment) on Ubuntu, CentOS and Debian](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/install-gui-desktop-environment-on-ubuntu-centos-and-debian.md): Install XFCE desktop environment on Ubuntu, CentOS, and Debian servers via apt/yum package managers and configure lightdm or xinit display manager.

## Operating system
- [Buy a Windows server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/operating-system/buy-a-windows-server.md): Purchase Windows Server VPS instances by selecting datacenter, plan, payment period, and Windows Server OS during checkout; unavailable for KVM-SSD-1/2/3 plans.
- [Install a Linux OS from a template](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/operating-system/install-a-linux-os-from-a-template.md): Reinstall Linux OS on virtual servers using VM Manager templates including CentOS, Debian, FreeBSD, and Ubuntu distributions.
- [Install a Linux OS from your ISO image](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/operating-system/install-a-linux-os-from-your-iso-image.md): Boot a VPS from custom ISO image via Disks menu, set boot priority, and access installation through VNC console.
- [Install an operating system from a template in VMmanager 6](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/operating-system/install-an-os-from-a-template-in-vmmanager-6.md): Reinstall virtual machine operating systems from CentOS, Debian, FreeBSD, or Ubuntu templates in VMmanager 6 with optional application scripts and password c...
- [Install OS from ISO on in VMmanager 6](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/operating-system/install-an-os-from-iso-in-vmmanager-6.md): Mount ISO images to VMmanager 6 virtual servers via HTTP(S) or FTP URLs with optional OS tags for script execution.

## Networking
- [Allocate an IPv6 address in VMmanager 6](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/networking/allocate-an-ipv6-address-in-vmmanager-6.md): Allocate and view IPv6 subnets and addresses assigned to Virtual Servers in VMmanager 6 Virtual machines tab.

## Additional IP addresses
- [Buy an additional IP address](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/manage/networking/additional-ip-addresses/buy-an-additional-ip-address.md): Purchase additional IPv4 and IPv6 addresses for Dedicated Servers and Virtual Private Servers via Control Panel IP addresses management.
- [Configure an additional IP address](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/networking/additional-ip-addresses/configure-an-additional-ip-address.md): Configure additional IPv4 and IPv6 addresses on Debian/Ubuntu, CentOS, and Windows Server 2012 by editing network configuration files or Server Manager setti...
- [Set up a PTR record](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/manage/set-up-a-ptr-record.md): Configure PTR records for VPS and Dedicated Server IP addresses to enable reverse DNS mapping for email server authentication.
- [Delete a virtual server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/delete-a-virtual-server.md): Remove virtual servers from Control Panel; permanently deletes data and stops billing after minimum 1-month service term.

## Troubleshooting
- [Renew your server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-a-server-that-was-suspended-for-non-payment.md): Recharge account balance or enable auto-payment to reactivate suspended virtual servers and resolve non-payment status.
- [Troubleshoot a server that is not responding to ping requests](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-a-server-that-is-not-responding-to-ping-requests.md): Diagnose ping connectivity failures by checking Great Firewall blocks, verifying network configuration (IP address, netmask, gateway), and confirming additio...
- [Remove your IP address from blacklists](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/remove-your-ip-address-from-blacklists.md): Check IP blacklist status using third-party services and contact blacklist operators for delisting; configure DNS records and email authentication to prevent...
- [Troubleshoot errors with ISO image installation](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-errors-with-iso-image-installation.md): Diagnose ISO image upload failures, file naming requirements, size limits, and quota constraints in virtual server management.
- [Troubleshoot blocked SMTP ports](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-blocked-smtp-ports.md): Diagnose and resolve blocked SMTP ports 25, 465, 587 on Virtual Servers by checking support tickets and contacting technical support with domain or configura...
- [Troubleshoot issues with an incorrect IP location](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-issues-with-an-incorrect-ip-location.md): Verify IP geolocation accuracy using MaxMind and RIPE databases; contact support to request location updates if discrepancies persist.
- [Troubleshoot issues with SSH connection](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/virtual-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-issues-with-ssh-connection.md): Verify SSH port 22 connectivity using telnet or Putty, validate server credentials from Control Panel Instructions, and check OS settings via VNC/IPMI if con...
- [Troubleshoot packet loss and high ping](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/dedicated-servers/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-packet-loss-or-high-ping.md): Diagnose packet loss and latency exceeding 110ms using ping, tracert/traceroute/mtr commands; disable VPN/proxy or reset network settings via OS reinstall.

## Other services

## DDoS protection
- [About GCore DDoS protection for dedicated servers](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ddos-protection/about-gcore-ddos-protection-for-dedicated-servers.md): Configure Gcore DDoS Protection for Dedicated Servers with Basic or Advanced modes (on-demand/always-on) using TMS traffic filtering against L3-L7 attacks.
- [Activate DDoS protection for your dedicated servers](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ddos-protection/activate-ddos-protection-for-your-dedicated-servers.md): Enable DDoS protection for dedicated servers by specifying OSI layers (L3-L4 or L3-L7), protection mode (on-demand or always-on), bandwidth, and IP whitelist...

## DNS hosting
- [Manage DNS hosting](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/dns-hosting/manage-dns-hosting.md): Order and configure DNS hosting service to manage up to 25 domains, set SOA/MX/A records, and add domains via control panel.

## SSL certificates
- [About SSL certificates](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ssl-certificates/about-ssl-certificates.md): Provision domain-validated (DV) and organization-validated (OV) SSL certificates including RapidSSL, Comodo, and Thawte variants with wildcard subdomain supp...
- [Activate an SSL certificate](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ssl-certificates/activate-an-ssl-certificate.md): Activate DV and OV SSL certificates by confirming domain ownership via email link or providing company verification details to the certification authority.

## BGP
- [Activate BGP](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/bgp/activate-bgp.md): Enable BGP announcement of dedicated server IP addresses via Control Panel and support ticket for IP mobility and geofencing bypass.

## Link aggreagtion
- [Activate Link aggregation](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/link-aggreagtion/activate-link-aggregation.md): Configure LACP link aggregation on Ubuntu servers using ifenslave, bonding kernel module, and /etc/interfaces configuration for Port Channel service.

## Account management
- [Set up notifications](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/set-up-notifications.md): Configure email notifications in Control Panel User Settings for server end-date alerts and support ticket updates per user account.
- [Manage your password](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/manage-your-password.md): Change Control Panel password via Client Profile with 8+ characters including uppercase and number; recover forgotten password via recovery page or contact s...
- [Set up two-factor authentication](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/set-up-two-factor-authentication.md): Enable two-factor authentication in user Settings using Google Authenticator QR code or manual key entry, then authorize with six-digit codes and disable 2FA...

## Users
- [Add a new user to your account](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/users/add-a-new-user-to-your-account.md): Create new Control Panel user accounts with name, email, and password via Tools menu to grant multi-user access without credential sharing.
- [Configure user rights](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/users/configure-user-rights.md): Set user permissions in Control Panel via Client > Users > Perm to enable/disable access to sections, operations, and subsections; configure full access or b...
- [View the authorization history of your account](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/view-the-authorization-history-of-your-account.md): View authorization attempts logged in Control Panel Access Log with timestamps, user email/ID, and source IP addresses.

## Payments
- [Pay for GCore services (payment methods)](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/pay-for-gcore-services-payment-methods.md): Add funds to Gcore account via PayPal, bank transfer, bank card (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Union Pay), or Alipay in USD or EUR.
- [Renew the server](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/renew-your-server.md): Renew Virtual and Dedicated Servers via automatic balance charging or manual renewal button; servers suspend after insufficient funds with deletion timelines...
- [Set up auto payment](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/set-up-auto-payment.md): Enable auto payment with configurable monthly charge limit to automatically recharge account balance from bank card for service plan renewals.
- [Troubleshoot payment errors](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/troubleshoot-payment-errors.md): Diagnose payment failures including insufficient funds, declined transactions, unsupported currency-provider combinations, Ayden processing errors, and bank ...
- [Check the payment history](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/check-the-payment-history.md): View and download payment invoices in Control Panel Billing → Payments section.
- [Request a refund](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/request-a-refund.md): Submit refund requests via Control Panel support ticket with server details; refunds process to account balance Monday-Friday only.
- [Contact our technical support](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/contact-our-technical-support.md): Access 24/7 technical support via live chat on gcore.com or submit support tickets through Control Panel Support Tickets section.
- [Manage hosting services via API](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/manage-hosting-services-via-api.md): Access Billmanager, DCImanager, and VMmanager APIs to automate server provisioning, dedicated server management, and VPS operations.
- [Become a reseller and resell our services](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/become-reseller-and-resell-our-services.md): Contact technical support to enroll in reseller program, specify company details and product type (VPS or dedicated server), and receive volume-based discoun...
